title: Be able to sidescroll in a board when reading a message
excerpt: When reading a message (conversation) in a board, one should be able to do horizontal scroll in this board to see all the columns. Otherwise one need to first close the message or open another tab to see the boards infor…

posts.author: Barton25 (Bart Vermeulen)
posts.cookedHtml: When reading a message (conversation) in a board, one should be able to do horizontal scroll in this board to see all the columns. Otherwise one need to first close the message or open another tab to see the boards information in order to anwer the message.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Bart,

Can you clarify where you’re logging these messages/conversations? Are you referring to the updates section or perhaps a text column in your board? When reading a message through the updates section, it should be possible to side scroll so you’re able to view the columns in your board. Is this not the case on your end?
